entry.value: select case when watermark is null then 0 else watermark end as watermark from (select max(watermark) as watermark from nifi_testing.counters where table_name = '${target}');
insert into nifi_testing.counters values ('${target}', ${offset:plus(${limit:multiply(5)})}) on conflict (table_name) do update set watermark = ${offset:plus(${limit:multiply(5)})};
